title: Inline <script> block in PHP echo output
description: PHP code echoes a <script> block directly, embedding JavaScript in PHP output instead of a separate .js asset.
explanation: Inline JS in PHP output prevents browser caching, blocks CSP enforcement, and tangles presentation with server logic.
fix: Move JS to a .js file in assets/ and load via $this->AddHeaderJavascript() or a template <script src>.
